urdu transliteration text: Mera Hussain Bagh e Nabuwat ka phool hai
english translation text: My Hussain (a.s.) is a flower from the garden of Prophethood

urdu transliteration text: Mera Hussain Bagh e Nabuwat ka phool hai,Haider ki isme jaan hai khoon e Batool hai.
english translation text:
My Hussain (a.s.) is a flower from the garden of Prophethood,
He is the strength of Ali (a.s) and blood of Fatima (s.a.)

urdu transliteration text: Aal-e-Nabi ka pyaar hey Imaan ki zindagiIn se nahi hey pyaar to sab kuch fazoool hey
english translation text:
The love of Ahlulbayt (a.s.) is the soul of faith,
Without love for them, everything if futile

urdu transliteration text: Aisi azeem zaat hai Maula hussain ki,Jiske liye rasool ke sajdo me tool hai
english translation text:
Such is the greatness of Imam Husssain,
That Prophet (s.a.w) lengthens his prostration for him

urdu transliteration text: Duniya me aur kaun hey Shabbir ke baghairaisa sawaar jis ki sawari Rasool hey
english translation text:
The world has not seen a personality like Hussain (a.s.),
Such a rider whose mount is Prophet (s.a.w)

urdu transliteration text:
Guzra jahan jahan say nawasa rasool kaAb tak wahan khuda k karam ka nuzool hai
Whichever place the grandson of the Prophet passed through,
english translation text: The blessings of Allah (s.w.t) descend on those places to this day

urdu transliteration text:
jis ke liye yazeed ne itney sitam kiyewo Taj to Hussain ke qadmo ki dhool hey
